name: JetBrains Central
description: An open system for agentic software development that serves as the control and execution plane for agent-driven software production. Connects tools, agents, and infrastructure with governance, agent execution infrastructure, and semantic context sharing across repositories.
capabilities: Cloud agent runtimes and computation provisioning
Task routing to appropriate models or tools
Semantic context aggregation across code/architecture/runtime behavior
Agent workflow management across IDEs, CLIs, and web interfaces
Integration with Slack, Atlassian, Linear for agent collaboration
pricing: Per-organization pricing model (details pending Q2 2026 launch)
notes: Announced March 24, 2026 at announcement event. Early Access Program launching Q2 2026 with limited design partners. Supports agents from JetBrains, Anthropic (Claude Agent), Google (Gemini CLI), and custom-built solutions. Distinct from Air App (workspace coordination tool) which complements Central.
